---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# `movexplR6`

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of `movexplR6` is to demonstrate using [`R6` objects](https://r6.r-lib.org/index.html) in [Shiny app-packages](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shiny-app-pkgs/).

## Installation

You can install the development version of `movexplR6` from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("mjfrigaard/movexplR6")
```

Check the documentation for more information.
